title: Commission credentials travel as vault handles, never values
description: A Commission carries credentials only as SecretRef handles ({"vault": "..."}), and the run_requested snapshot reproduces them verbatim. The supervisor resolves handles to secret material out of band (the agent here runs on its native ANTHROPIC_API_KEY); the value never appears on the wire, so the trajectory snapshot shows the handle. Structural and model-agnostic. The complementary guarantee (a resolved value never leaks into the snapshot) is enforced supervisor-side and unit-tested in the avp CLI, where resolution actually happens.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.

events.label: run_requested snapshot carries the provider credential as a vault handle
